releases.name: v1.0.17 — Production Release
releases.author: auditadmin
releases.body_md:
## Storage Intelligence Platform v1.0.17

### Packages
| Package | Format | Target |
|---------|--------|--------|
| scanner-server | .deb | Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+ |
| scanner-server | .rpm | RHEL 8+, Rocky 9+, AlmaLinux 9+ |
| scanner-agent | .deb | Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+ |
| scanner-agent | .rpm | RHEL 8+, Rocky 9+, AlmaLinux 9+ |
| scanner-agent | .zip | Windows Server 2019+ |
| scanner-server | docker tar.gz | Any Docker 24+ host |

### Quick Install
```bash
tar xzf audit-platform-1.0.17.tar.gz
cd release/1.0.17
sudo ./bundle/install.sh                    # server
sudo ./bundle/install.sh --component agent  # agent
```

### Certification
This release has passed the 7-gate certification model.
See `evidence/certification-report.md` inside the archive.

### Changes since v1.0.11
- b78570f fix: lazy annotations in structured.py for Python 3.9 (RPM build gate)
- 9d354ee feat: enterprise auth, SIEM connectors, compliance reports, remediation (v1.0.13–1.0.17)
- 53b89cf refactor: split admin settings into Settings / Alerts / System pages
- 5906f80 feat: findings alerting system (v1.0.14)
- 3aa5372 feat: permissions mapping, expanded patterns, dedicated Findings page (v1.0.13)
- d8797e1 feat: content scanning, custom file type registry, targeted scans, analytics improvements (v1.0.12)

### Changes since v1.0.3
- 0e4116c chore: bump version to 1.0.10 for patch release
- 60f7929 feat: agent auto-update mechanism (Step 8)
- 15adcae feat: SBOM auto-generation in CI (Step 7)
- 8d969c3 feat: dashboard analytics (Step 6)
- f16af55 feat: scan result export CSV/JSON (Step 5)
- 7dee7e2 feat: alerting & notifications (Step 4)
- 7ea0d96 feat: add API rate limiting, licence expiry banner, agent version tracking, and scheduled backups
- b7456ed chore: ignore built Linux packages under release/<version>/
- a65f581 chore: add v1.0.3 release evidence, docs, and bundle
- 8f4a349 docs: add CHANGELOG.md with full version history

### Certification
This release has passed the 7-gate certification model.
See `evidence/certification-report.md` inside the archive.

### Changes since v1.0.2
- 3da4637 fix: use .NET GZipStream instead of gzip for Docker image compression
- b40d6a6 fix: idempotent publish — delete existing release before recreating
- e8bf127 fix: run Docker build job on scanner-windows runner (has Docker Desktop)
- bcf3d11 fix: mount Docker socket in CI job containers and install Docker CLI
- 628148c fix: add httpx to CI pip install — required by licensing module
- d65272a chore: bump version to 1.0.3
- ef34a54 feat: add pg_dump database backup with browser download and server-side write
- 077ba74 Add admin backup feature with configurable destination path
- 4cbb8e1 feat: add full licensing module with Keygen integration

### Certification
This release has passed the 7-gate certification model.
See `evidence/certification-report.md` inside the archive.

### Changes since v1.0.0
- b6e7dbf fix: require explicit login for web UI; show admin nav for admin role
- bfcf50c fix: evict expired JWTs in getToken() to prevent spurious login redirects
- 036134e fix: jobs page no longer redirects to login on loadBatches() auth error

releases.name: v1.0.0 — Production Release
releases.author: auditadmin
releases.body_md:
## Storage Intelligence Platform v1.0.0

### Packages
| Package | Format | Target |
|---------|--------|--------|
| scanner-server | .deb | Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+ |
| scanner-server | .rpm | RHEL 8+, Rocky 9+, AlmaLinux 9+ |
| scanner-agent | .deb | Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+ |
| scanner-agent | .rpm | RHEL 8+, Rocky 9+, AlmaLinux 9+ |
| scanner-agent | .zip | Windows Server 2019+ |
| scanner-server | docker tar.gz | Any Docker 24+ host |

### Quick Install
```bash
tar xzf audit-platform-1.0.0.tar.gz
cd release/1.0.0
sudo ./bundle/install.sh                    # server
sudo ./bundle/install.sh --component agent  # agent
```

### Certification
This release has passed the 7-gate certification model.
See `evidence/certification-report.md` inside the archive.

### Changes since v1.0.0-rc2
- 459063e fix: replace --fail-with-body with -w http_code (curl 7.74 compat on Bullseye)
- acf2487 fix: make cp commands non-fatal in assemble step (same-file on checkout)
- 189322e fix: remove build-docker from publish needs to unblock Gitea release
- 21708d9 fix: use find glob in verify-rpm step to handle dist tag in filename
- 0fbe9f6 fix: add RPM spec files and remove *.spec from .gitignore
- 539571f fix: convert X|None union syntax to Optional[X] for Python 3.9 compat
- e06cd2c fix: downgrade artifact actions from v4 to v3 for Gitea compatibility
- 94ba1bd fix: set default shell to bash for all workflow run steps
- f198cf0 fix: resolve Gate 5 repo-drift failures in build-deb and build-rpm
- ea42033 debug: print dirty files in Gate 5 to diagnose CI repo drift
- 9a6fde9 fix: pass Gate 2 + Gate 5 in release certification
- 7112fbe fix(agent): reset rate limiter clock after sleep to prevent token leak
- d4554fc fix: token bucket initial burst and SQLAlchemy migration test type error
- ca61568 fix(ci): set PIP_BREAK_SYSTEM_PACKAGES for Debian Bookworm PEP 668
- 8fb947e fix(ci): use custom builder images with Node.js + Python pre-installed
- a7a1c1a fix(ci): use python:3.11-bullseye container for build-deb job
- 381da20 Fix release workflow: remove workflow_dispatch inputs (unsupported in Gitea 1.22)
- e64be9c ci: test workflow trigger (trailing newline)
- 2708609 Fix release workflow tag trigger pattern (glob not regex)
- a6bf5f9 Fix accessibility and HTML validation errors across UI templates
- 4bb463f Add CI/CD pipelines, dashboard fixes, and v1.0.0 release pack
- c0beab2 feat: production monitoring dashboard with charts and alerts
- 6433c6b docs: add monitoring metrics reference for deployment dashboard (doc 21)
- 5e14b69 docs: add operator troubleshooting quick reference (doc 20)
- 0ef2a04 docs: add L1/L2 support runbook (doc 19)
- a5649e0 docs: add operator training guide for first 24-48 hours (doc 18)
- 16d3562 docs: polish deployment checklist for v1 external use
- 623dadd docs: add operator deployment checklist (doc 17)
- 613a4ae feat: production deployment profile — execution controls v2
- ff93dbc fix: bandit/flake8 clean pass — nosec annotations, walker.py type safety
- f230ea5 fix: resolve all remaining flake8 warnings in tools/
- 833e199 fix: remove unused imports in test_execution_controls (pytest, calculate_next_run)
- 8955769 docs: document scheduler design decisions (single-instance, skip missed runs)
- 3b8b6be feat: execution controls — agent pacing, upload throttle, scheduler concurrency guard
- 250c238 Add Admin UI section: Users, Roles (RBAC), and Settings management
- 46a1ab2 Add control-plane scheduler (DB + engine + API + UI + CLI + tests)
- a23be52 Add linting config, type checks, integration/unit tests, and API/agent fixes
- 7a30956 Implement automatic incremental scanning (spec steps 1-22)
- 5e66111 Add scan behaviour documentation (doc 15)
- 9fb9fbc Bake docs into server image; install manifest on bare-metal install
- 731c768 Mount docs/ and release-manifest into scanner-server container
- 48d2e31 Change default admin password to Admin1234! (unambiguous for browser autofill)
- 78f9d0f Fix UI router for Starlette 1.x: use keyword-style TemplateResponse(request=, name=, context=)
